issues.description: 18 sub-formatter scripts dispatched via runtime EXT_MAP path join. A bug in the dispatcher or wrong CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT silently disables all language formatters with no error. No startup validation.
issues.suggestion: Add EXT_MAP validation at dispatch startup: verify each resolved script path exists and emit a stderr warning for any missing.

issues.description: auto-checkpoint (sync, PostToolUse) commits the file before post-edit-format-dispatch (async) runs. The checkpoint captures unformatted code. /undo restores pre-format state.
issues.suggestion: Document this trade-off. If unacceptable: make format-dispatch synchronous and reorder so checkpoint fires after format.

issues.description: Up to 5 synchronous spawnSync git calls per Edit/Write. On slow repos this blocks the PostToolUse handler for 1-3 seconds per file edit, even with the 60-second rate limit.
issues.suggestion: Migrate git calls to async spawn with Promise wrappers.

issues.description: On long sessions, reads and parses the full JSONL transcript via fs.readFileSync on every Stop hook invocation. Large transcripts (>5MB) create measurable latency.
issues.suggestion: Add a file-size guard: for transcripts >5MB, read only the tail (last ~50,000 bytes).

issues.description: tdd-sequence-guard fires on every Write to a source file lacking a test counterpart — affects non-TDD projects, infra scripts, generated code, and migrations.
issues.suggestion: Skip for paths matching infra/, migrations/, scripts/, generated/, __generated__. Consider defaulting to disabled.

issues.description: Fires on valid .md files (API.md, NOTES.md, SETUP.md) that don't match its allowlist. Always exits 0, never blocks, but noisy.
Generic pattern /exited with code [1-9]/i matches any non-zero Bash exit, not just build failures. isBuildCmd check mitigates but not eliminates.
Missing explicit process.exit(0) at end of stdin handler, inconsistent with all other hook scripts.
Uses process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE fallback instead of os.homedir(). Less reliable cross-platform.

missing_hooks: PostToolUse on Write for TypeScript typecheck — post-edit-typecheck.js matches only Edit. New .ts/.tsx files written via Write are not type-checked.
PreToolUse on Edit for secret scan — pre-write-secret-scan.js matches only Write. Secrets introduced via Edit new_string are only caught at git commit time.
No .rb extension in EXT_MAP in post-edit-format-dispatch.js — Ruby files not auto-formatted despite ruby-reviewer agent being present.
dead_scripts_note: 18 sub-formatter scripts dispatched via post-edit-format-dispatch.js at runtime via EXT_MAP — not dead code, but fragile indirect references. If dispatcher fails, all 18 silently die.
